evidence: "This is, without a doubt, the funniest thing I have ever seen in my entire life..."
"the idea of having a priest as the main character, and having a show that acknowledges the reality of spirituality..."
"Like any short film, you have to pay attention... it is hard to pack a story into only 15 min..."
"The script is filled with 'inside jokes' for the hard core Sci-fi fan..."
"I mean literally, laughed so hard that you fell down in your chair..."
"Michelle Dockery shines in this short film..."
"The visuals are great, the story of the siege is very compelling..."
"Top Gear without the boys is like an airplane with no wings."
"the ambiguity of some of his actions is well played..."
"This is something you should watch with someone, because it will make you think..."
"I used to wonder why more people didn't defect from East Germany..."
"She's as much a victim of her brother's crime as the child he was arrested for assaulting."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedies and dramas that evoke emotional responses, often appreciating high production quality. They enjoy fast-paced narratives and are sensitive to the emotional weight of stories, while showing less loyalty to specific creators or franchises.
